# Caleb Pierre — Remote Systems Agency
# Caleb Pierre / Los Angeles, CA / AI Engineering & Cybersecurity

> Caleb Pierre is a forward-deployed AI engineer and security engineer based in Los Angeles, CA. He builds AI agent systems, automation pipelines, and security infrastructure for businesses across LA County — from enterprise security teams to nonprofit organizations. 10 years of experience across Tinder (Security Engineer II), Verizon Media, Children's Hospital LA, Glass Financial (CTO), and now Caleb Pierre Ventures.

## Core Services
- AI Agent Development: Custom AI agents that do real work — LLM orchestration, MCP integration, RAG pipelines, and multi-agent workflows. Eliminates 40-60% of manual overhead.
- Cybersecurity: SOAR/SIEM (Splunk, QRadar), Zero Trust Architecture, HIPAA/HiTECH compliance, vulnerability assessment, incident response. Enterprise-grade security for LA businesses.
- Business Automation: Zapier, n8n, Make, and custom Python agents connecting disparate systems into unified, self-operating infrastructure.
- Web Design: Next.js, React, Tailwind — sites built to convert, not just to look nice. Deployed on AWS/GCP with Docker, CI/CD via GitHub Actions.
- Content Marketing: Content systems that compound — SEO-optimized articles, programmatic landing pages, and AI-crawler-friendly llms.txt protocol.
- Remote Tech Support: A real engineer on call, not a ticket number.
